user_intent: Continue a named campaign from a detailed handoff
observations: README.md points new sessions to STATE/CURRENT.md
The task handoff contains its own authority hierarchy
target_actions: Read README.md, STATE/CURRENT.md, and docs/PROJECT_INSTRUCTIONS.md first
Use the handoff for task scope after applying repository-global authority
target_conclusion: The user handoff controls the assigned task, while STATE controls repository truth.
negative_action: Treat the campaign handoff as the highest repository authority without reading STATE.

user_intent: Find existing mathematics supporting an open continuation stage
observations: STATE/RESULTS.md says POPULATION PENDING
STATE/DEFINITIONS.md says POPULATION PENDING
Relevant material may exist outside STATE
target_actions: Emit CANON_NOT_POPULATED_SEARCH_FALLBACK_REQUIRED
Search engine, research, docs, then archive
Classify discoveries as candidates until a canon or admission link is found
target_conclusion: Absence from an explicitly unpopulated canon is not evidence of repository absence.
negative_action: Report that no result exists because RESULTS.md has no entry, or promote the first historical match as current.

observations: The user supplied an explicit CCE handoff
STATE/CURRENT.md does not list CCE as active work
target_actions: Accept the user handoff as current task scope
Report the missing canonical campaign registration
Propose but do not silently apply a STATE campaign delta
target_conclusion: CCE is active for this user task but is not represented in canonical global current state.
negative_action: Ignore the user task because CURRENT.md omits it, or silently rewrite CURRENT.md.

user_intent: Determine the real blockers for CCE-5 through CCE-8
observations: Existing stage reports declare blockers
Broader search finds additional exact work for CCE-5, CCE-7, and CCE-8
The old reports retain provenance value
target_actions: Create a superseding findings record
State field-level corrections
Preserve predecessor reports
Propose canonical supersession metadata
target_conclusion: The old reports remain historical evidence but their blocker summaries are not the best current retrieval answer.
negative_action: Delete old reports, or continue presenting them as current without mentioning recovered work.

user_intent: Use the Lloyd Mathematics Encyclopedia in the source search
observations: The Encyclopedia subject pages locate relevant Cella material
The user states it is the same material
Entries can resolve to underlying Cella sources
target_actions: Use the Encyclopedia as an index
Resolve every hit to source artifact identity
Deduplicate by artifact id or digest
target_conclusion: The Encyclopedia improves retrieval but does not independently corroborate the indexed Cella claim.
negative_action: Count an Encyclopedia entry and its Cella source as two independent evidence items.

observations: The theorem body is at archive/Reference_Material/papers/current/dbp_orbit_calculus.tex
Production code cites Reference_Material/papers/current/dbp_orbit_calculus.tex
README.md says archive is never authoritative
target_actions: Mark material_support true
Mark production_reference true
Mark canonical_authority false
Propose admission or migration plus fresh verification
target_conclusion: The role theorem is valuable candidate material and production-linked, but archive location prevents silent canonical use.
negative_action: Promote the file because its directory contains the word current or because production cites it.

user_intent: Audit the Paper-IV horizon theorem and package
observations: The same theorem filename appears in research/paper, docs/files, and a publication package
Copies may have the same SHA-256
target_actions: Compute digests
Select one canonical artifact identity
Classify other copies as mirrors or package members
target_conclusion: Multiple paths with one digest represent one underlying theorem claim unless declared otherwise.
negative_action: Treat each path as independent proof support.

user_intent: Decide whether the E-atom derivation closes CCE-5
observations: E_ATOM_DERIVATION derives an absolute rank-2 K/E Picard-Fuchs system
CCE-5 requires a relative third-kind or inhomogeneous system plus topological calibration
target_actions: Compare carrier, basis, domain, and output signatures
Classify the source as PARTIAL_SUPPORT
Enumerate the missing relative extension and calibration
target_conclusion: The absolute K/E block is a strict subproblem of CCE-5, not the full target.
negative_action: Match the phrase exact connection and mark CCE-5 complete.

user_intent: Determine whether legendre_native.py is clean replay evidence
observations: Stages 1 and 2 run successfully
Stage 3 raises ModuleNotFoundError for verify_local_curvature_calculus
research/derivations/README.md documents the non-portable helper
target_actions: Record stage-level pass and failure
Classify the verifier as PARTIAL_REPLAY_ONLY
Preserve successful exact outputs
Require dependency repair before promotion
target_conclusion: The artifact contains useful exact derivation code but is not a self-contained clean verifier.
negative_action: Call the whole verifier clean because early stages pass, or discard all derivation content because the final import fails.

user_intent: Assess existing runtime support for CCE-7 and CCE-8
observations: Pathfinder recognizers produce exact plans and obligations
Contracts name external executor modules
Continuation adapters and independent replay are not supplied by those contracts
target_actions: Report recognizer, planner, scout, executor, certificate builder, and verifier separately
Do not infer runtime execution from a route contract
target_conclusion: Exact planning support exists, but the continuation executor and certificate integration remain separate work.
negative_action: Describe a provider with execution_module external.* as a completed runtime adapter.

user_intent: Decide whether Stage-2 surface checks close CCE-6
observations: Stage 2 derives exact sweep algebra and fixed dual contour avoidance
The verifier passes 17 of 17 gates
CCE-6 requires clearance over corridor times angular cover times fibre sweep including extra divisors
target_actions: Retain Stage-2 formulas and gates as reusable support
Classify the full target as DOMAIN_EXTENSION_UNPROVED
List missing polar, norm, and boundary-collision bounds
target_conclusion: Fixed-contour endpoint geometry does not entail corridor-wide full-sweep clearance.
negative_action: Promote the 17 of 17 Stage-2 result to a complete CCE-6 admission theorem.

user_intent: Use the R5 physical-root theorem in a CCE-7 release
observations: LOG_ENTRY_R5_total_reality_v2.md says promoted and established
STATE/RESULTS.md has no migrated R5 entry
C-003 requires fresh in-repo verification before current status
target_actions: Report origin_status established
Report state_canon_status not_migrated
Inspect or replay fresh certificates
Propose a ratified migration
target_conclusion: R5 is strong mathematical support, but documentary origin status is not itself current STATE authority.
negative_action: Collapse origin status, fresh verification, and canon status into one label current.

user_intent: Follow a production provider to its theorem source
observations: The source reference omits the archive prefix
The reference uses a TeX theorem anchor
The basename exists under archive/Reference_Material/papers/current
target_actions: Resolve by artifact id if available
Fallback to exact basename search
Verify path, anchor, and digest
Mark guessed free-form resolution as degraded
target_conclusion: The source can be found, but its metadata is not directly machine-resolvable and should be repaired.
negative_action: Silently guess the path and record the free-form reference as valid.

user_intent: Add a report without disturbing an in-progress repository migration
observations: git status shows deleted old paths, untracked moved trees, and modified registration files
The user did not ask to repair or stage migration changes
target_actions: Preserve unrelated changes
Record HEAD and relevant digests
Consult migration records before classifying missing paths
Add only the requested artifact
target_conclusion: Dirty migration state is context to preserve, not permission to normalize the worktree.
negative_action: Restore, stage, rename, or delete unrelated files to make status clean.

user_intent: Use paths named in a campaign handoff
observations: The handoff named pathfinder_m1_scout.py
The named file is valid campaign-local work but was the wrong implementation for this task
The primary typed Pathfinder is under engine/src/cella/pathfinder
target_actions: Classify both implementations by scope
Validate handoff paths against production imports and task requirements
Use the primary typed Pathfinder tree for the production task without deprecating the campaign-local scout
target_conclusion: A valid alternate implementation can still be the wrong path for a specific task; non-primary does not mean stale or forbidden.
negative_action: Globally deprecate the campaign-local scout merely because the task required the primary production tree.

user_intent: Start the new task placed in the same agent_tasks folder
observations: Multiple versioned handoff files exist
No CURRENT.json identifies the active file
Modification time and lexical version may not express user intent
target_actions: Look for a current-task manifest
If absent, inventory candidate tasks
Use explicit user direction and avoid mtime-only selection
target_conclusion: Task identity needs an explicit pointer; folder proximity is not authority.
negative_action: Choose the lexically last or newest-mtime file without validation.

user_intent: Minimize repeated parsing and stale task state
observations: The CCE handoff exceeds one thousand lines
It mixes stable protocol with current blockers and outputs
Blocker statements changed after a repository recovery pass
target_actions: Separate stable campaign protocol from current task and current state manifests
Digest stable protocol independently
Update fast-changing state without rewriting doctrine
target_conclusion: Stable policy and volatile campaign state should be separate artifacts.
negative_action: Create another full handoff copy for every blocker update.

user_intent: Compile existing work that supports campaign continuation
observations: A filename inventory alone does not tell the next agent what to reuse
The user requested each source plus what will be extracted
target_actions: For every source state authority, exact claim, extraction target, exclusions, verification state, and remaining obligation
Map extracted material to theorem, state, code, or certificate consumers
target_conclusion: An actionable source-to-consumer map is more valuable than a document summary.
negative_action: Return a list of relevant files with generic one-line descriptions.
